name: Voice Assistant (INMP441 + MAX98357A)
description: Full-duplex voice assistant: INMP441 mic captures audio → WebSocket streams raw PCM to server → STT → LLM → TTS → PCM streams back → MAX98357A speaker plays response. Zero user code. Server handles all AI pipelines (local Whisper+Ollama, Sarvam, Gemini).

chunk_size.description: WebSocket packet size in bytes (must be even)

outputs.audio_stream: Raw PCM s16le mono via WebSocket
outputs.speaker_playback: TTS response via ring buffer → I2S DAC

use_cases: Multilingual voice interface (Hindi, Tamil, English via Sarvam)
